description: Unified Memory Schema for GenTech Suite — shared memory layer that enables cross-layer data flow

entry.source: string — which layer originated this (journal, cookbook, gaming, travel, tutors, social)
entry.category: string — primary category (cooking, finance, gaming, travel, learning, social, personal)
tags: string[] — topic tags for cross-layer matching
entry.confidence: number 0-1 — how confident the agent is in the categorization

suggested: string[] — other layers this could belong to
autoAdded: string[] — layers this was autonomously added to
pending: string[] — layers waiting for user confirmation

user.name: string
layers: string[] — which layers the user has active

layer.id: string — cookbook, journal, travel, gaming, tutors, social
layer.name: string
subscribedTags: string[] — tags this layer wants to receive
autoAddTags: string[] — tags that trigger autonomous adding
suggestTags: string[] — tags that trigger user prompts

crossLayerRules.message: You mentioned food in your journal. Want me to add this to your Cookbook?
You mentioned travel in your journal. Want me to add this to your Travels?

crossLayerRules.trigger: Cookbook mentions a dish from a specific region
crossLayerRules.message: This dish is from a specific region. Want me to add it to your travel food guide?
Added regional food info to your Cookbook from your travel plans.

crossLayerRules.trigger: Gaming mentions a strategy or build
crossLayerRules.message: You're learning new strategies. Want me to track this as a learning goal?

crossLayerRules.trigger: Any layer mentions a goal or habit
crossLayerRules.message: You mentioned a goal. Want me to add this to your Journal for tracking?
